item.title: VW Golf 6 rear wiper fluid leak fix
item.description: A few months the rear wiper started leaking a bit of wiper fluid inside my VW Golf 6. The problem got worse over time and now I end up with a buddle inside my car. I looked it up online and it seemed to be a common issue with this generation of VW vehicles. The hose is made of PVC, which tends to brake as these cars age. As I had a bit of time on my hand I decided to finally tackle this.
